children.heading: Organ
children.label: 1 Organ
children.text: The term “organ” has the meaning given such term in section 121.2 of title 42, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Organ procurement organization
children.label: 2 Organ procurement organization
children.text: The term “organ procurement organization” means a qualified organ procurement organization described in .section 273(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network
children.label: 3 Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network
children.text: The term “Organ Procurementand Transplantation Network” means the Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network established under .1section 274 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “Procurement and”.1
